mapper.select: SELECT user_id, external_user_no, password_hash, gender, birth_year, register_time, user_status, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY user_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT user_id, external_user_no, password_hash, gender, birth_year, register_time, user_status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_id, external_user_no, password_hash, gender, birth_year, register_time, user_status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE external_user_no = #{externalUserNo} LIMIT 1
